actionableQuestion: How am I performing overall?
aiPromptHint: Summarise overall score, pass/fail status, class benchmark, percentile, and the most useful next action based only on returned fields.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
cohort_distribution AS (
  SELECT ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_median_score
  FROM score_agg
),
ranked_scores AS (
  SELECT sa.*,
         ROUND(AVG(sa.avg_score) OVER ()::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_score,
         cd.class_median_score,
         ROUND((sa.avg_score - AVG(sa.avg_score) OVER ())::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_vs_class_avg,
         ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sa.avg_score) * 100)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS score_percentile,
         COUNT(*) OVER ()::int AS cohort_size
  FROM score_agg sa
  CROSS JOIN cohort_distribution cd
)
SELECT rs.avg_score,
       rs.pass_rate,
       rs.perf_trend AS performance_trend,
       e.final_outcome,
       rs.class_avg_score,
       rs.class_median_score,
       rs.score_vs_class_avg,
       rs.score_percentile,
       rs.cohort_size,
       rs.unweighted_avg_score,
       rs.weighted_avg_score,
       rs.score_strategy,
       rs.assessment_count,
       rs.score_scale,
       rs.pass_threshold,
       rs.target_threshold,
       CASE
         WHEN rs.avg_score < rs.pass_threshold THEN 'below_pass_threshold'
         WHEN rs.avg_score < rs.target_threshold THEN 'passing_but_below_target'
         WHEN rs.score_percentile >= 75 THEN 'strong_relative_performance'
         ELSE 'on_track'
       END AS performance_band
FROM ranked_scores rs
JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = rs.student_id
                 AND e.class_id = :class_id
WHERE rs.student_id = :student_id

actionableQuestion: Am I at risk of failing?
aiPromptHint: State the risk badge (low/medium/high) and at_risk_score out of 5. Use avg_score, pass_threshold, engagement_score, and punctuality_rate when available. If risk is high, name the top 2 likely triggered factors from returned metrics only.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = :class_id
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT rf.avg_score,
       rf.engagement_score,
       rf.engagement_score_available,
       rf.punctuality_rate,
       rf.previous_attempt_count,
       rf.score_strategy,
       rf.score_scale,
       rf.pass_threshold,
       rf.target_threshold,
       rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score,
       CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label
FROM risk_flags rf
WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id

actionableQuestion: How active am I compared to classmates?
aiPromptHint: Describe effort level in plain language using study_effort_level, total_engagement_count, active_days, engagement_score, and class_avg_engagement_score. Compare to class averages only from returned fields, and avoid calling missing engagement data low effort.
sqlQuery:
WITH class_engagement AS (
  SELECT e.enrollment_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_engagement_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.enrollment_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_engagement_count), 0) AS max_engagement_count,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS max_active_days
  FROM class_engagement
),
scored AS (
  SELECT ce.enrollment_id,
         ce.total_engagement_count,
         ce.active_days,
         ROUND((
           COALESCE(ce.total_engagement_count / cm.max_engagement_count, 0) * 0.5
           + COALESCE(ce.active_days / cm.max_active_days, 0) * 0.5
         )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS engagement_score
  FROM class_engagement ce
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT enrollment_id,
         NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY total_engagement_count) AS ntile_val
  FROM class_engagement
),
class_summary AS (
  SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_engagement_count)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_total_engagement_count,
         ROUND(AVG(active_days)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_active_days,
         ROUND(AVG(engagement_score)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS class_avg_engagement_score
  FROM scored
)
SELECT s.total_engagement_count,
       s.total_engagement_count AS total_clicks,
       s.active_days,
       s.engagement_score,
       cs.class_avg_total_engagement_count,
       cs.class_avg_active_days,
       cs.class_avg_engagement_score,
       CASE r.ntile_val
         WHEN 1 THEN 'very_low'
         WHEN 2 THEN 'low'
         WHEN 3 THEN 'medium'
         ELSE 'high'
       END AS study_effort_level
FROM scored s
JOIN ranked r ON r.enrollment_id = s.enrollment_id
CROSS JOIN class_summary cs
WHERE s.enrollment_id = :enrollment_id

actionableQuestion: How much do I need to study to pass / get a higher score?
aiPromptHint: Use regression coefficients to explain which input (study time vs engagement) contributes more. Give concrete score estimate.
sqlQuery: WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), cohort_fe AS ( SELECT sa.student_id, sa.avg_score, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_agg ea ON ea.student_id = sa.student_id CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), model AS ( SELECT REGR_SLOPE(avg_score, engagement_score) AS coef_engagement, REGR_INTERCEPT(avg_score, engagement_score) AS intercept FROM cohort_fe ) SELECT cf.student_id, cf.engagement_score, cf.avg_score, m.coef_engagement, m.intercept, CASE WHEN m.coef_engagement IS NULL OR m.intercept IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE m.intercept + m.coef_engagement * cf.engagement_score END AS predicted_avg_score, CASE WHEN cf.student_id = :student_id THEN true ELSE false END AS is_selected_student FROM cohort_fe cf CROSS JOIN model m ORDER BY is_selected_student DESC, cf.engagement_score

actionableQuestion: Am I getting better or worse over time?
aiPromptHint: Identify trend direction, assessments below pass/target thresholds, and the concrete recommended_action for the weakest recent assessment.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
),
class_assessment AS (
  SELECT ar.assessment_id,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.assessment_id
),
student_trend AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS performance_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE ar.student_id = :student_id
    AND a.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT a.assessment_order,
       a.week_of_class,
       a.assessment_type,
       a.assessment_name,
       ar.score_normalized,
       (ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold) AS pass_flag,
       ca.class_avg_score,
       ROUND((ar.score_normalized - ca.class_avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_vs_class_avg,
       sc.score_scale,
       sc.pass_threshold,
       sc.target_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold) AS below_pass_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold) AS below_target_threshold,
       st.performance_trend,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'urgent_support'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'targeted_practice'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'monitor'
         ELSE 'maintain'
       END AS support_level,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'Review this assessment with tutor support; focus on missed core concepts before the next assessment.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'Practice similar questions and review feedback to move from pass-level to target-level performance.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'You are passing but below class average here; review feedback and compare preparation habits.'
         ELSE 'Keep the current preparation pattern and use feedback to protect this level.'
       END AS recommended_action
FROM assessment_result ar
JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
JOIN class_assessment ca ON ca.assessment_id = ar.assessment_id
CROSS JOIN score_context sc
LEFT JOIN student_trend st ON st.student_id = ar.student_id
WHERE ar.student_id = :student_id
  AND a.class_id = :class_id
ORDER BY a.assessment_order

actionableQuestion: Which skill area should I prioritise for improvement?
aiPromptHint: Highlight which competency tags have lowest avg scores. Suggest focus areas.
semanticNote: competency_tag uses a 3-tier COALESCE fallback: (1) native competency_tag if dataset has competency ontology, (2) assessment_name as proxy (UCI: G1/G2/G3, OULAD: TMA01/CMA01), (3) 'Unknown' as final safety net.
sqlQuery: WITH scored AS (SELECT CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN a.competency_tag WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL AND a.assessment_name !~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN a.assessment_name WHEN a.assessment_type IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(a.assessment_type, ' ', COALESCE(a.assessment_order::text, a.assessment_name)) ELSE 'Unknown' END AS competency_tag, CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL OR a.assessment_type IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END AS competency_source, a.assessment_type, ar.score_normalized, ar.pass_flag FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id=:student_id AND a.class_id=:class_id) SELECT competency_tag, competency_source, assessment_type, ROUND(AVG(score_normalized)::numeric,2)::float8 AS avg_score, ROUND(AVG(pass_flag::int)::numeric,4)::float8 AS pass_rate, COUNT(*) AS assessment_count FROM scored GROUP BY competency_tag, competency_source, assessment_type ORDER BY avg_score ASC

actionableQuestion: Where do I stand compared to my class?
aiPromptHint: Show student's standing (top X%). Explain which metrics are above/below average.
sqlQuery:
WITH cohort_scores AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0)::float8 AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0)::float8 AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
cohort_eng AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ROUND((COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5 + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT cs.student_id,
         cs.avg_score AS student_avg_score,
         COALESCE(ce.engagement_score, 0)::float8 AS engagement_score,
         ROUND(AVG(cs.avg_score) OVER ()::numeric, 2)::float8 AS cohort_avg_score,
         ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cs.avg_score) * 100)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS score_percentile,
         ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(ce.engagement_score, 0)) * 100)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS engagement_percentile
  FROM cohort_scores cs
  LEFT JOIN cohort_eng ce ON cs.student_id = ce.student_id
),
selected AS (
  SELECT * FROM ranked WHERE student_id = :student_id
)
SELECT 'Average score' AS metric_name, 'You' AS comparison_group, student_avg_score AS metric_value, 1 AS sort_order FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Average score', 'Cohort benchmark', cohort_avg_score, 1 FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score percentile', 'You', score_percentile, 2 FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score percentile', 'Cohort benchmark', 50::float8, 2 FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Engagement percentile', 'You', engagement_percentile, 3 FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Engagement percentile', 'Cohort benchmark', 50::float8, 3 FROM selected
ORDER BY sort_order, comparison_group DESC

                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = :class_id
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT flag_name,
       flag_value,
       threshold,
       triggered,
       severity,
       flag_description,
       recommended_action,
       support_category
FROM (
  SELECT 'flag_low_score' AS flag_name,
         rf.avg_score AS flag_value,
         rf.pass_threshold AS threshold,
         rf.flag_low_score AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'high' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         'Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.' AS flag_description,
         'Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.' AS recommended_action,
         'academic_performance' AS support_category,
         1 AS sort_order
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_repeated',
         rf.previous_attempt_count::float8,
         0::float8,
         rf.flag_repeated,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         'This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.',
         'Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.',
         'academic_history',
         2
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_engagement',
         rf.engagement_score::float8,
         0.15::float8,
         rf.flag_low_engagement,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement
              THEN 'Engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold.'
              ELSE 'Engagement score is above the safety threshold.' END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement
              THEN 'Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.'
              ELSE 'Maintain a consistent weekly study routine and keep using course resources.' END,
         'engagement',
         3
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_punctuality',
         rf.punctuality_rate::float8,
         0.7::float8,
         rf.flag_low_punctuality,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         'Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.',
         'Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.',
         'time_management',
         4
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_neg_trend',
         COALESCE(rf.perf_trend, 0)::float8,
         0::float8,
         rf.flag_neg_trend,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend
              THEN 'Scores are trending downward across assessments.'
              ELSE 'Scores are maintaining an upward or stable trend across assessments.' END,
         'Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.',
         'trend_monitoring',
         5
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id
) flags
ORDER BY sort_order

actionableQuestion: Which weeks did I disengage and why might that be?
aiPromptHint: Describe engagement pattern. Flag weeks with sharp drops. Note if drop precedes assessment.
sqlQuery: -- [OULAD only]-- FIX: FIRST_VALUE does not support FILTER in PostgreSQL (pure window fn).--      Use MIN() FILTER(WHERE...) OVER() instead — aggregate window fn, supports FILTER.WITH weekly AS (  SELECT eng.week_number,         SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks  FROM engagement eng  WHERE eng.enrollment_id = :enrollment_id  GROUP BY eng.week_number),rolling AS (  SELECT week_number,         weekly_clicks,         AVG(weekly_clicks) OVER (           ORDER BY week_number           ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING         ) AS rolling_3wk_avg  FROM weekly)SELECT week_number,       weekly_clicks,       rolling_3wk_avg,weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5            AS weekly_engagement_drop,       MIN(week_number)         FILTER (WHERE weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5)         OVER ()                                        AS early_warning_week FROM rolling ORDER BY week_number

actionableQuestion: Am I studying steadily or only before exams?
aiPromptHint: Distinguish 'steady learner' from 'pre-exam crammer'. Recommend a consistent weekly routine.
sqlQuery: WITH weekly AS ( SELECT week_number, SUM(engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM engagement WHERE enrollment_id = :enrollment_id GROUP BY week_number ), student_consistency AS ( SELECT COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev, AVG(weekly_clicks) AS weekly_avg, SUM(weekly_clicks) AS total_clicks FROM weekly ), class_weekly AS ( SELECT e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number, SUM(eng2.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM enrollment e2 JOIN engagement eng2 ON e2.enrollment_id = eng2.enrollment_id WHERE e2.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number ), class_student_consistency AS ( SELECT enrollment_id, COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM class_weekly GROUP BY enrollment_id ), class_thresholds AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p33, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p66 FROM class_student_consistency ) SELECT w.week_number, w.weekly_clicks, sc.weekly_stddev, sc.weekly_avg, sc.total_clicks, CASE WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p33, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'high' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p66, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS consistency_level FROM weekly w CROSS JOIN student_consistency sc CROSS JOIN class_thresholds ct ORDER BY w.week_number

sqlQuery: -- [OULAD only]-- submission_delay_days removed from schema [F24] (cross-table: needs assessment.due_day).-- submission_day is still in assessment_result — computed inline as (submission_day - due_day).SELECT a.assessment_order,       a.assessment_type,       a.assessment_name,       (ar.submission_day - a.due_day)                          AS submission_delay_days,       ar.score_normalized,       ar.pass_flag,       ar.submission_day,       a.due_day,       AVG(ar.submission_day - a.due_day)         FILTER (WHERE (ar.submission_day - a.due_day) > 0)         OVER ()                                                 AS submission_delay_avg,       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day)OVER () * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) OVER (), 0)            AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = :student_id AND a.class_id = :class_id ORDER BY a.assessment_order

actionableQuestion: Could my lifestyle habits be affecting my academic results?
aiPromptHint: Compare the selected student against the class lifestyle-risk scatter. Highlight the student's position and any cohort-level association between lifestyle_risk_score and avg_score. Frame as correlation, not causation.
sqlQuery:
WITH score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT e.student_id,
       CASE WHEN e.student_id = :student_id THEN 'Selected student' ELSE 'Classmate' END AS point_role,
       (e.student_id = :student_id) AS is_current_student,
       s.alcohol_weekday,
       s.alcohol_weekend,
       s.go_out_freq,
       s.health_status,
       s.family_relation,
       s.free_time,
       ROUND(COALESCE(
         s.lifestyle_risk_score,
         (((COALESCE(s.alcohol_weekday, 0) + COALESCE(s.alcohol_weekend, 0)) / 10.0) * 0.4)
         + ((COALESCE(s.go_out_freq, 0) / 5.0) * 0.3)
         + (((5 - COALESCE(s.health_status, 5)) / 5.0) * 0.3)
       )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS lifestyle_risk_score,
       ROUND(sa.avg_score::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score
FROM enrollment e
JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  AND s.source_dataset = 'UCI'
ORDER BY is_current_student ASC, lifestyle_risk_score DESC

sqlQuery: -- [OULAD only]WITH resource_clicks AS (SELECT ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM engagement eng JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id=ev.event_id WHERE eng.enrollment_id=:enrollment_id GROUP BY ev.resource_type),totals AS (SELECT SUM(clicks) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS distinct_types FROM resource_clicks),class_distinct AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ev2.resource_type) AS class_total_types FROM event ev2 WHERE ev2.class_id=:class_id)SELECT rc.resource_type, rc.clicks, rc.clicks*1.0/NULLIF(t.total_clicks,0) AS pct_of_total,  t.distinct_types*1.0/NULLIF(cd.class_total_types,0) AS vle_diversity_score,  SUM(CASE WHEN rc.resource_type='forumng' THEN rc.clicks ELSE 0 END) OVER()*1.0/NULLIF(t.total_clicks,0) AS forum_engagement_rate FROM resource_clicks rc, totals t, class_distinct cd ORDER BY rc.clicks DESC

actionableQuestion: Did enrolling late put me at a disadvantage?
aiPromptHint: Explain whether early enrollment correlates with better outcome. Frame as associative, not causal.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
cohort AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         e.registration_lead_time::float8 AS registration_lead_time,
         sa.avg_score,
         CASE WHEN e.student_id = :student_id THEN 'Selected student' ELSE 'Classmate' END AS student_marker
  FROM enrollment e
  JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = e.student_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
    AND e.registration_lead_time IS NOT NULL
    AND sa.avg_score IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT student_id,
       registration_lead_time,
       avg_score,
       student_marker,
       ROUND(AVG(registration_lead_time) OVER ()::numeric, 2)::float8 AS cohort_avg_registration_lead_time,
       ROUND(AVG(avg_score) OVER ()::numeric, 2)::float8 AS cohort_avg_score,
       ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY registration_lead_time) * 100)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS registration_timing_percentile,
       ROUND((PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_score) * 100)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS score_percentile,
       CASE WHEN student_id = :student_id THEN true ELSE false END AS is_selected_student
FROM cohort
ORDER BY is_selected_student DESC, registration_lead_time

action.action_text: Contact your tutor and make a short recovery plan for the next assessed topic.

Do not diagnose the reason for the low score.

claim_limits: Do not promise that the action will achieve the target.
Preserve the runtime threshold values and score scale.

claim_limits: Do not claim the slope proves future decline.
Do not infer a cause for the trend.

claim_limits: Do not trigger when engagement_score_available is false.
Do not claim engagement caused the student's score.

actionableQuestion: What should I do differently starting next week?
aiPromptHint: Synthesise all [FE] risk signals into 3–5 prioritised actions. Reference which FE feature triggered each item.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = :class_id
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
),
absence_calc AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         e.class_id,
         e.absences,
         ROUND((
           e.absences::float8 / NULLIF(MAX(e.absences) OVER (PARTITION BY e.class_id), 0)
         )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS absence_rate
  FROM enrollment e
  WHERE e.student_id = :student_id
    AND e.class_id = :class_id
)
SELECT rf.avg_score,
       rf.perf_trend AS performance_trend,
       rf.engagement_score,
       rf.engagement_score_available,
       ac.absence_rate,
       s.lifestyle_risk_score,
       rf.score_strategy,
       rf.score_scale,
       rf.pass_threshold,
       rf.target_threshold,
       rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score,
       CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label
FROM risk_flags rf
LEFT JOIN absence_calc ac ON ac.student_id = rf.student_id
JOIN student s ON s.student_id = rf.student_id
WHERE rf.student_id = :student_id

actionableQuestion: Is my social life balanced with my academic commitments?
aiPromptHint: Compare the selected student against the class social-balance scatter. Highlight the student's position and any cohort-level association between social_balance_score and avg_score. Frame as correlation, not causation.
sqlQuery:
WITH score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT e.student_id,
       CASE WHEN e.student_id = :student_id THEN 'Selected student' ELSE 'Classmate' END AS point_role,
       (e.student_id = :student_id) AS is_current_student,
       s.free_time,
       s.go_out_freq,
       s.alcohol_weekday,
       s.alcohol_weekend,
       ROUND(COALESCE(
         s.social_balance_score,
         ((COALESCE(s.free_time, 3) / 5.0) * 0.30)
         + ((COALESCE(s.go_out_freq, 3) / 5.0) * 0.35)
         + ((((COALESCE(s.alcohol_weekday, 0) + COALESCE(s.alcohol_weekend, 0)) / 2.0) / 5.0) * 0.35)
       )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS social_balance_score,
       ROUND(sa.avg_score::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score
FROM enrollment e
JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  AND s.source_dataset = 'UCI'
ORDER BY is_current_student ASC, social_balance_score DESC

actionableQuestion: How might my family background be reflected in my academic patterns?
aiPromptHint: Compare the selected student against the class family-context scatter. Highlight the student's position and any cohort-level association between family_stability_score and avg_score. Frame findings as associative, not causal, and avoid prescriptive suggestions.
sqlQuery:
WITH score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
family_context AS (
  SELECT s.*,
         CASE
           WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(s.mother_education_level, '')) ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
             THEN s.mother_education_level::float8
           ELSE 2.0
         END AS mother_education_numeric,
         CASE
           WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(s.father_education_level, '')) ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
             THEN s.father_education_level::float8
           ELSE 2.0
         END AS father_education_numeric
  FROM student s
)
SELECT e.student_id,
       CASE WHEN e.student_id = :student_id THEN 'Selected student' ELSE 'Classmate' END AS point_role,
       (e.student_id = :student_id) AS is_current_student,
       fc.family_relation,
       fc.parent_cohabitation_status,
       fc.mother_education_level,
       fc.father_education_level,
       ROUND(COALESCE(
         fc.family_stability_score,
         ((COALESCE(fc.family_relation, 3) / 5.0) * 0.50)
         + ((CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(fc.parent_cohabitation_status, 'T')) = 'T' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) * 0.25)
         + ((((fc.mother_education_numeric + fc.father_education_numeric) / 2.0) / 4.0) * 0.25)
       )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS family_stability_score,
       ROUND(sa.avg_score::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score
FROM enrollment e
JOIN family_context fc ON fc.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  AND fc.source_dataset = 'UCI'
ORDER BY is_current_student ASC, family_stability_score DESC

actionableQuestion: What score do I need on remaining assessments to pass or hit my target?
aiPromptHint: Report current_score against pass_threshold/target_threshold, then needed_score_for_pass and needed_score_for_target. Interpret pass_goal_status and target_goal_status explicitly (already_achieved, achievable, unreachable, no_remaining_below_threshold) and use remaining_assessments + calculation_mode to suggest the next realistic step.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
),
assessment_plan AS (
  SELECT a.assessment_id,
         a.assessment_order,
         a.weight_pct::float8 AS weight_pct
  FROM assessment a
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
),
student_progress AS (
  SELECT ap.assessment_id,
         ap.assessment_order,
         ap.weight_pct,
         ar.score_normalized::float8 AS score_normalized
  FROM assessment_plan ap
  LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar
    ON ar.assessment_id = ap.assessment_id
   AND ar.student_id = :student_id
),
aggregate_metrics AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_assessments,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sp.score_normalized IS NOT NULL)::int AS completed_assessments,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sp.score_normalized IS NULL)::int AS remaining_assessments,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.score_normalized), 0)::float8 AS sum_completed_scores,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.score_normalized * sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS weighted_points_completed,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS total_weight_pct,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL AND sp.score_normalized IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS completed_weight_pct,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL AND sp.score_normalized IS NULL), 0)::float8 AS remaining_weight_pct
  FROM student_progress sp
),
goal_calc AS (
  SELECT sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         am.total_assessments,
         am.completed_assessments,
         am.remaining_assessments,
         am.total_weight_pct,
         am.completed_weight_pct,
         am.remaining_weight_pct,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS calculation_mode,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.completed_weight_pct > 0
             THEN am.weighted_points_completed / NULLIF(am.completed_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.completed_assessments > 0
             THEN am.sum_completed_scores / NULLIF(am.completed_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS current_score_raw,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.remaining_weight_pct > 0
             THEN (sc.pass_threshold * am.total_weight_pct - am.weighted_points_completed) / NULLIF(am.remaining_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct = 0 AND am.remaining_assessments > 0
             THEN (sc.pass_threshold * am.total_assessments - am.sum_completed_scores) / NULLIF(am.remaining_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS required_pass_raw,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.remaining_weight_pct > 0
             THEN (sc.target_threshold * am.total_weight_pct - am.weighted_points_completed) / NULLIF(am.remaining_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct = 0 AND am.remaining_assessments > 0
             THEN (sc.target_threshold * am.total_assessments - am.sum_completed_scores) / NULLIF(am.remaining_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS required_target_raw
  FROM score_context sc
  CROSS JOIN aggregate_metrics am
)
SELECT ROUND(gc.current_score_raw::numeric, 2)::float8 AS current_score,
       ROUND(gc.score_scale::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_scale,
       ROUND(gc.pass_threshold::numeric, 2)::float8 AS pass_threshold,
       ROUND(gc.target_threshold::numeric, 2)::float8 AS target_threshold,
       gc.completed_assessments,
       gc.remaining_assessments,
       ROUND(gc.completed_weight_pct::numeric, 2)::float8 AS completed_weight_pct,
       ROUND(gc.remaining_weight_pct::numeric, 2)::float8 AS remaining_weight_pct,
       gc.calculation_mode,
       ROUND(CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 THEN CASE WHEN gc.current_score_raw >= gc.pass_threshold THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
         ELSE GREATEST(gc.required_pass_raw, 0)
       END::numeric, 2)::float8 AS needed_score_for_pass,
       ROUND(CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 THEN CASE WHEN gc.current_score_raw >= gc.target_threshold THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
         ELSE GREATEST(gc.required_target_raw, 0)
       END::numeric, 2)::float8 AS needed_score_for_target,
       CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw >= gc.pass_threshold THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw < gc.pass_threshold THEN 'no_remaining_below_threshold'
         WHEN gc.required_pass_raw <= 0 THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.required_pass_raw <= gc.score_scale THEN 'achievable'
         ELSE 'unreachable'
       END AS pass_goal_status,
       CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw >= gc.target_threshold THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw < gc.target_threshold THEN 'no_remaining_below_threshold'
         WHEN gc.required_target_raw <= 0 THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.required_target_raw <= gc.score_scale THEN 'achievable'
         ELSE 'unreachable'
       END AS target_goal_status
FROM goal_calc gc

actionableQuestion: Which assessments are already submitted and which are still pending?
aiPromptHint: Summarise progress in assessment_order using submission_status and submitted_flag. Highlight the earliest pending assessment_name (with due_day if present), then propose one concrete next step.
sqlQuery:
SELECT a.assessment_order,
       a.assessment_name,
       a.assessment_type,
       a.week_of_class,
       a.due_day,
       ar.submission_day,
       ar.score_normalized,
       CASE WHEN ar.assessment_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'submitted' ELSE 'pending' END AS submission_status,
       CASE WHEN ar.assessment_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS submitted_flag
FROM assessment a
LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar
  ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
 AND ar.student_id = :student_id
WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
ORDER BY a.assessment_order ASC, a.assessment_name ASC

actionableQuestion: How is the class performing overall?
aiPromptHint: Describe score spread. Flag if large proportion below pass threshold.
sqlQuery: WITH per_student AS (SELECT e.student_id, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY e.student_id), bucketed AS (SELECT CASE WHEN avg_score IS NULL THEN 'No score' WHEN avg_score < 10 THEN '0-10' WHEN avg_score < 20 THEN '10-20' WHEN avg_score < 30 THEN '20-30' WHEN avg_score < 40 THEN '30-40' WHEN avg_score < 50 THEN '40-50' WHEN avg_score < 60 THEN '50-60' WHEN avg_score < 70 THEN '60-70' WHEN avg_score < 80 THEN '70-80' WHEN avg_score < 90 THEN '80-90' ELSE '90-100' END AS score_bucket, CASE WHEN avg_score IS NULL THEN 11 WHEN avg_score < 10 THEN 1 WHEN avg_score < 20 THEN 2 WHEN avg_score < 30 THEN 3 WHEN avg_score < 40 THEN 4 WHEN avg_score < 50 THEN 5 WHEN avg_score < 60 THEN 6 WHEN avg_score < 70 THEN 7 WHEN avg_score < 80 THEN 8 WHEN avg_score < 90 THEN 9 ELSE 10 END AS bucket_order, avg_score FROM per_student) SELECT score_bucket, COUNT(*)::int AS student_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS pct_of_class, ROUND(AVG(avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score_in_bucket FROM bucketed GROUP BY score_bucket, bucket_order ORDER BY bucket_order

actionableQuestion: How many students passed, failed, or withdrew?
aiPromptHint: State pass/fail/withdrawal counts. Highlight proportion at-risk.
sqlQuery: SELECT final_outcome, COUNT(*) AS student_count, ROUND(COUNT(*)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 0),1) AS pct_of_class FROM enrollment WHERE class_id=:class_id GROUP BY final_outcome ORDER BY student_count DESC

actionableQuestion: What proportion of the class is disengaged?
aiPromptHint: Describe proportion of low/medium/high effort students. Flag the low tail.
sqlQuery: WITH eng_agg AS (SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY e.student_id, e.enrollment_id), class_stats AS (SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS max_clicks, MAX(active_days) AS max_active FROM eng_agg), scored AS (SELECT ea.student_id, ea.total_clicks, ea.active_days, ROUND((COALESCE((ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cs.max_clicks, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days / NULLIF(cs.max_active, 0)) * 0.5, 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_stats cs), categorized AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 'very_low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.35 THEN 'low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.60 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM scored), levels(study_effort_level, sort_order) AS (VALUES ('very_low', 1), ('low', 2), ('medium', 3), ('high', 4)) SELECT l.study_effort_level, COUNT(c.student_id)::int AS student_count, ROUND((COUNT(c.student_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(c.student_id)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS pct_of_class, ROUND(AVG(c.engagement_score)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS avg_engagement_score FROM levels l LEFT JOIN categorized c ON c.study_effort_level = l.study_effort_level GROUP BY l.study_effort_level, l.sort_order ORDER BY l.sort_order

actionableQuestion: How many students need urgent intervention?
keyDbFields: at_risk_score [FE]; enrollment_id and avg_score from enrollment + score_agg JOIN (not from risk_flags directly)
aiPromptHint: State number of high/medium/low risk students. Recommend immediate review of high group.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         es.engagement_score AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = :class_id
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label,
       COUNT(*)::int AS student_count
FROM risk_flags rf
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 1 WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END)

aiPromptHint: Summarise who this student is and where they stand across all dimensions (score, engagement, risk) in plain language.
sqlQuery: WITH score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY ar.student_id), eng_agg AS (SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 1 THEN 'very_low' WHEN NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 2 THEN 'low' WHEN NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 3 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm), punctuality AS (SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rf.at_risk_score = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, es.engagement_score, es.study_effort_level FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = actionableQuestion: Is this student getting better or worse — and how fast?
aiPromptHint: Identify whether student is improving or declining. Reference performance_trend [FE] slope direction and magnitude.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
),
class_assessment AS (
  SELECT ar.assessment_id,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.assessment_id
),
student_trend AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS performance_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE ar.student_id = :student_id
    AND a.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT a.assessment_order,
       a.week_of_class,
       a.assessment_type,
       a.assessment_name,
       ar.score_normalized,
       (ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold) AS pass_flag,
       ca.class_avg_score,
       ROUND((ar.score_normalized - ca.class_avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_vs_class_avg,
       sc.score_scale,
       sc.pass_threshold,
       sc.target_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold) AS below_pass_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold) AS below_target_threshold,
       st.performance_trend,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'urgent_support'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'targeted_practice'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'monitor'
         ELSE 'maintain'
       END AS support_level,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'Review this assessment with tutor support; focus on missed core concepts before the next assessment.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'Practice similar questions and review feedback to move from pass-level to target-level performance.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'Student is passing but below class average here; review feedback and preparation habits.'
         ELSE 'Keep the current preparation pattern and use feedback to protect this level.'
       END AS recommended_action
FROM assessment_result ar
JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
JOIN class_assessment ca ON ca.assessment_id = ar.assessment_id
CROSS JOIN score_context sc
LEFT JOIN student_trend st ON st.student_id = ar.student_id
WHERE ar.student_id = :student_id
  AND a.class_id = :class_id
ORDER BY a.assessment_order

actionableQuestion: When exactly did this student start disengaging?
aiPromptHint: Flag the exact week engagement dropped. Compare to pre-drop average. Recommend admin outreach timing.
sqlQuery: WITH weekly AS ( SELECT week_number, SUM(engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM engagement WHERE enrollment_id = :enrollment_id GROUP BY week_number ), weekly_enriched AS ( SELECT week_number, weekly_clicks, AVG(weekly_clicks) OVER (ORDER BY week_number ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS rolling_3wk_avg, weekly_clicks - LAG(weekly_clicks) OVER (ORDER BY week_number) AS weekly_engagement_drop FROM weekly ), student_consistency AS ( SELECT COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM weekly ), class_weekly AS ( SELECT e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number, SUM(eng2.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM enrollment e2 JOIN engagement eng2 ON e2.enrollment_id = eng2.enrollment_id WHERE e2.class_id = :class_id GROUP BY e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number ), class_student_consistency AS ( SELECT enrollment_id, COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM class_weekly GROUP BY enrollment_id ), class_thresholds AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p33, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p66 FROM class_student_consistency ), classified AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p33, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'high' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p66, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS consistency_level FROM student_consistency sc CROSS JOIN class_thresholds ct ), warning AS ( SELECT MIN(week_number) AS early_warning_week FROM weekly_enriched WHERE rolling_3wk_avg IS NOT NULL AND weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5 ) SELECT we.week_number, we.weekly_clicks, we.rolling_3wk_avg, we.weekly_engagement_drop, w.early_warning_week, c.consistency_level FROM weekly_enriched we CROSS JOIN warning w CROSS JOIN classified c ORDER BY we.week_number

actionableQuestion: Which specific risk factors should admin address for this student?
aiPromptHint: For each triggered flag, state the exact value and why it crosses the threshold. Prioritise the top 2 for immediate action.
sqlQuery:
WITH
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized)                             AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment  a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment  e ON ar.student_id    = e.student_id
                    AND a.class_id       = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
           / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                              AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id   = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id      = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = :class_id
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT flag_name, flag_value, threshold, triggered, severity, flag_description, recommended_action, support_category
FROM (
  SELECT 'flag_low_score'        AS flag_name,
         sa.avg_score            AS flag_value,
         40                      AS threshold,
         (sa.avg_score < 40)     AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 'high' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         'Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.' AS flag_description,
         'Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.' AS recommended_action,
         'academic_performance' AS support_category
  FROM score_agg sa
  WHERE sa.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_high_absence'     AS flag_name,
         e.absences::float       AS flag_value,
         10                      AS threshold,
         (e.absences > 10)       AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN e.absences > 10 THEN 'high' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         CASE WHEN e.absences > 10 THEN 'Absence count is above the high-absence threshold.' ELSE 'Absences are within the high-absence risk limit.' END AS flag_description,
         CASE WHEN e.absences > 10 THEN 'Check attendance barriers and arrange follow-up before missed sessions accumulate further.' ELSE 'Keep monitoring attendance and confirm there are no new absence spikes.' END AS recommended_action,
         'attendance' AS support_category
  FROM enrollment e
  WHERE e.student_id = :student_id AND e.class_id = :class_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_punctuality'  AS flag_name,
         p.punctuality_rate      AS flag_value,
         0.7                     AS threshold,
         (p.punctuality_rate < 0.7) AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN p.punctuality_rate < 0.7 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         CASE WHEN p.punctuality_rate < 0.7 THEN 'Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.' ELSE 'Submission punctuality meets the expected threshold.' END AS flag_description,
         CASE WHEN p.punctuality_rate < 0.7 THEN 'Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.' ELSE 'Keep using deadline reminders and submit drafts early.' END AS recommended_action,
         'time_management' AS support_category
  FROM punctuality p
  WHERE p.student_id = :student_id
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_neg_trend'        AS flag_name,
         COALESCE(sa.perf_trend, 0) AS flag_value,
         0                       AS threshold,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0)     AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 'Scores are trending downward across assessments.' ELSE 'Scores are maintaining an upward or stable trend across assessments.' END AS flag_description,
         CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 'Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.' ELSE 'Continue monitoring assessment feedback over time.' END AS recommended_action,
         'trend_monitoring' AS support_category
  FROM score_agg sa
  WHERE sa.student_id = :student_id
) flags
